title: Flight Computer
subtitle: Central flight-compute and black-box avionics board for sensing, storage, telemetry, and recovery coordination
stackup: Four copper-layer flight computer PCB exported from Altium Gerbers
summary: The central compute and data-recording board for the flight avionics stack. It integrates power regulation, environmental and inertial sensors, ADC acquisition, onboard flash storage, current-loop interfaces, telemetry, USB, and recovery-system connectivity. I supported portions of schematic/layout review, then led system bring-up, interface validation, debugging, and continued board operation.
mainConstraints: Stage bring-up of power, compute, sensing, storage, and communication subsystems
Verify sensor polarity, scaling, communication, and plausibility before vehicle integration
Keep low-level ADC and reference routing isolated from digital and telemetry activity
Validate recovery-system and current-loop interfaces at schematic and system level
Maintain reliable board operation through repeated bench, integration, and vehicle testing
publicNote: This case study is under construction; bring-up and interface-validation evidence will be added as public artifacts are cleared.

model3d.description: Interactive 3D board model from the Altium STEP export.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: Exported Altium schematic PDF covering connectors, power, ADCs, sensors, flash, current-loop, telemetry, USB, recovery-system interface, and layout notes.
